title: Λ-Bounty Submission (Conjecture 1 intake)
description: Payload POSTed to the Λ-bounty webhook intake endpoint. A valid payload is acknowledged with a hash-chained Khipu intake receipt. Eligibility for the founder-set award is still decided solely by the verify-proof CI on a pull request.

pr_url.description: The pull request against szl-holdings/lambda-bounty that carries the proof. CI on this PR is the sole arbiter.

axiom_print.description: Verbatim output of `#print axioms lambda_aggregator_unique`. Must list only propext / Quot.sound / Classical.choice.

sorry_free_claim.description: Submitter asserts no sorry/sorryAx under Lambda/. Verified independently by CI.

strategy.description: Short prose description of the proof strategy (optional but encouraged).

discharges_cauchy_nd.description: True if this submission discharges the n-D CAUCHY_ND residual (partial-tier eligible).
